nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2007; const int b = 2092; const int c = 2115; const int d = 2131; const int e = 2145; const int f = 2157; const int g = 2168; const int h = 2178; const int i = 2188; const int j = 2199; const int k = 2209; const int l = 2219; const int m = 2230; const int n = 2242; const int o = 2256; const int p = 2272; const int q = 2295; const int r = 2380;
